summary: Barcode Migration Testing Complete - All QR codes successfully replaced with Code128 barcodes. Verified barcode rendering in OrdenDetalle, EtiquetaOrden dialog, and new EtiquetaInventario dialog. All features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: No react-qr-code or QRCode imports found in jsx/js files (only qr-scanner for reading QR codes in Scanner.jsx, which is expected)
Barcode component correctly uses JsBarcode with CODE128 format
EtiquetaOrden and EtiquetaInventario dialogs have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Barcode migration from QR codes to Code128 barcodes is complete. All barcode components use JsBarcode library. Key components: Barcode.jsx (reusable component), EtiquetaOrden.jsx (order label dialog), EtiquetaInventario.jsx (inventory label dialog). OrdenDetalle.jsx and OrdenTecnico.jsx both import and use the Barcode component.
